author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/tui/app.rs::persist_transcript_tail: tracks an appended counter and advances the watermark by start + appended, NOT to session_messages.len(). The warn log now carries appended/remaining counts for diagnosis. Added two regression tests using a fault-injection EnvGuard (CLAUDE_CONFIG_HOME_DIR pointed at a tempdir, optionally with a file blocking projects/ creation) and promoted transcript::env_lock to pub(crate) so the TUI tests share the same serial-test gate the transcript module already had. 1821/1821 lib tests pass.
